ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label indicating the review status */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review provided by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the review */,
  "length_title" INTEGER /* Length of the review title in characters */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., published, pending, rejected) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category under which the product is classified */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the product was manufactured */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product (if applicable) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Current price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-review association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review submitted by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review from which the keyword was extracted */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword extracted from the review text */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of keyword (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_keywords_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being analyzed */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted for the product */,
  "total_positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews submitted for the product */,
  "total_negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews submitted for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who filed the report */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the review */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being responded to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response provided by the company */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., response, new review) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_notifications_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-category association */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being associated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being associated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag assigned to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
